description_long: This is a modern military jet aircraft with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme in shades of blue, gray, and white. The airplane features twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, swept-back wings with pronounced anhedral angles, and two large jet engines mounted at the rear of the fuselage. The nose is sharply pointed and painted black, leading to a forward-placed, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy. The wings are mid-mounted and have hardpoints for potential external stores or armaments. The overall design is optimized for high-speed flight and maneuverability, with visible air intakes and detailed surface paneling.
description: A modern military jet with blue-gray camouflage, twin vertical stabilizers, swept mid-mounted wings, and a pointed nose with a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the wide, swept wings with visible camouflage pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, mid-mounted swept wings, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet engine exhausts, dual vertical stabilizers, and the anhedral angle of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the cockpit and wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and pronounced anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; main and nose gear units implied.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single clear canopy, likely multi-seat.
